summary: Hero/Featured Space UI - Game (Live Game Hide Spoilers OFF)
description:
GIVE a user has launched the MLB.tv app

AND Hide Spoilers is set to OFF

AND a Live Game is present in the Hero/Featured Space



NOTE: Figma designs for Card States: [https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99561&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|https://www.figma.com/design/rGAWoDJL0fx7RTxv0er9U5/MLB.TV-Connected-Device-Developer-Spec?node-id=179-99561&t=2GMcHnOGaIH6wtRZ-0|smart-link]

steps.action:
WHEN a user is on the Home page

AND Game content is displayed in the Hero/Featured space
steps.result:
THEN the featured game image is displayed on the right 2/3 of the screen

AND the featured game image has a white border around the image indicating focus

AND the featured game image does not have a gradient applied

AND the featured game details are displayed to the left of the featured image, below the navigation header buttons (See attached screenshots and Figma designs for reference)
